column25: Really well. We had quite a neurodiverse team with strengths and weaknesses and I found myself as timekeeper to keep the solution on track. I wanted to do more dashboard work but someone needed to focus on the 'must ship' of the presentation so I spent most of my efforts into this.
column26:
A lot of the team wanted to spend time on working with the data which contributed to a large number of visuals. We had to have a very focused meeting before lunch to cut down on the amount of data. Perhaps I could have been more encouraging for the team to take different roles or split roles. However, I wanted the team to be motivated and get what they wanted out of the day so made a compromise. 
Using Claude or similar to do the dashboard as part of preparation for the hackathon. However, how do we improve our understanding of data of we totally rely on AI?
